description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel with a classic cylindrical shape, slightly bulging at the center and narrowing at the ends. The barrel is constructed from wooden staves, held together by three prominent black metal hoops that encircle its body. It sits on a sturdy wooden stand, elevating it slightly above the ground and providing stability. A small wooden spigot is visible at one end, suggesting the barrel is designed to dispense liquids, and a round wooden bung is fitted on top. The wood grain is clearly visible, giving the barrel a rustic and authentic appearance. There are no visible labels or markings on the exterior.
description: A medium wooden barrel with black metal hoops, a spigot, and a wooden stand, featuring visible wood grain and a round top bung.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel head, wooden spigot, and the supporting stand.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the barrel, three black metal hoops, and the wooden stand.
description_view_2: Rear view of the barrel head without a spigot, showing the wood grain and stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, with the spigot less visible and the metal hoops and stand in clear view.
